title: Measure lengths 1
description: Measure objects with same-size length units without gaps or overlaps.

assessment_items.question_content:
How tall is the castle?

You can measure the castle with small squares.

**Which picture shows how to measure the castle?**  
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The castle is** [[☃ input-number 1]] **squares tall.**
hints:
![One 4 cube rod. Castle shape starts at second cube of rod and is one cube taller  than the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0fe2299c12163b475972d468b4d743f4.png)  
The squares do not start at the bottom of the castle.

The squares do not stop at the top.

This is not measured correctly.

![A unit cube with a blank space above and another unit cube above the blank space. Castle shape starts at bottom cube and is one cube taller than the top cube.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/10787f2f0014aa4f5a3146b620f9c1bb.png)  
There is a gap between the squares.

This is not measured correctly.

![One 4 cube rod. Castle shape starts at bottom of rod and is as tall as the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6fc1cbacfe6fd60546c5ce5cc87c8997.png)  
**This castle is measured correctly.**
The castle is $\red4$ squares tall.

choices.content: ![One 4 cube rod. Castle shape starts at bottom of rod and is as tall as the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6fc1cbacfe6fd60546c5ce5cc87c8997.png)
![One 4 cube rod. Castle shape starts at second cube of rod and is one cube taller  than the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0fe2299c12163b475972d468b4d743f4.png)

![A unit cube with a blank space above and another unit cube above the blank space. Castle shape starts at bottom cube and is one cube taller than the top cube.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/10787f2f0014aa4f5a3146b620f9c1bb.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
How tall is the large square?

You can measure the large square with small squares.  

**Which picture shows how to measure the large square?** 
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The large square is** [[☃ input-number 1]] ** small squares tall.**
hints:
![One 4 cube rod. A square shape starts below the the first cube and ends below the bottom of the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1884b51c7c84143daf8ddb3c7a068b38.png)  
The small squares do not start at the bottom of the large square.

The small squares do not stop at the top.

This is not measured correctly.

![5 cubes overlapping and not lined up as a rod. A square begins at the top cube and ends at the bottom cube.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/868bded338c0ef505802f2452b1f95fbafc06931)

The small squares overlap.

This is not measured correctly.

![One 4 cube rod. A square shape starts at bottom of rod and is as tall as the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9f326e8f342e6ccc39f21f76cdaf0d22.png)  
**This large square is measured correctly.**
The large square is $\red4$ small squares tall.

choices.content: ![One 4 cube rod. A square shape starts at bottom of rod and is as tall as the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9f326e8f342e6ccc39f21f76cdaf0d22.png)
![One 4 cube rod. A square shape starts below the the first cube and ends below the bottom of the rod.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1884b51c7c84143daf8ddb3c7a068b38.png)
![5 cubes overlapping and not lined up as a rod. A square begins at the top cube and ends at the bottom cube. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/868bded338c0ef505802f2452b1f95fbafc06931)

assessment_items.question_content:
How tall is the box?

You can measure the box with small squares.  

**Which picture shows how to measure the box?** 
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The box is** [[☃ input-number 1]] **squares tall.**
hints:
![A 2 cube rod with a gap between the 2 cubes. The rod starts above the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54b683f4bba44950d5ab0a1e26e1d7c1.png)  
There is a gap between the squares.

This is not measured correctly.

![A 3 cube rod. The cubes are overlapping and they are not all the same size. The rod starts above the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/15721bec3a4bb3e0d944ee494e728ccf75780844)  
The blue squares overlap.  

This is not measured correctly.

![A 2 cube rod. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of  it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3e23ad1d28cc68f211b8c4fa3660dd8.png)  
**This box is measured correctly.**
The box is $\red2$ squares tall.

choices.content: ![A 2 cube rod. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of  it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3e23ad1d28cc68f211b8c4fa3660dd8.png)

![A 3 cube rod. The cubes are overlapping and they are not all the same size. The rod starts above the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/15721bec3a4bb3e0d944ee494e728ccf75780844)
![A 2 cube rod with a gap between the 2 cubes. The rod starts above the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54b683f4bba44950d5ab0a1e26e1d7c1.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
How tall is the wall?

You can measure the wall with small squares.  

**Which picture shows how to measure the wall?** 
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The wall is** [[☃ input-number 1]] **small squares tall.**
hints:
![A 7 cube rod. The rod starts below the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c293be8395a4a76bc03baccd34488908.png)  
The small squares do not start at the bottom of the green wall.

The small squares do not stop at the top.

This is not measured correctly.

![A 6 cube rod with a gap between the second and third cube. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5edf498d72d217ade0454bcd725ac1c.png)  
There is a gap between the small squares.

This is not measured correctly.

![A 7 cube rod. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c1dcb222e37332aae3544b6651ae8ef8.png)  
**This wall is measured correctly.**
The wall is $\red7$ small squares tall.

choices.content: ![A 7 cube rod. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c1dcb222e37332aae3544b6651ae8ef8.png)
![A 7 cube rod. The rod starts below the top of the rectangle and ends below the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c293be8395a4a76bc03baccd34488908.png)
![A 6 cube rod with a gap between the second and third cube. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5edf498d72d217ade0454bcd725ac1c.png)

The squares do not stop at the top.

![A 8 cube rod. The rod starts at the top of the rectangle and ends at the bottom of it.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1baea28661e2d295aeaf915f749e30a3.png)  
**This rectangle is measured correctly.**

assessment_items.question_content:
How long is Speedy's driver's license?

You can measure the license with small squares.  

**Which picture shows how to measure the license?** 
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The license is** [[☃ input-number 1]] **squares long.**
hints:
![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 10 units long but they are spaced uneven with gaps. It starts and ends at the edges of the license.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/57d05b8730c23c620a43b7bbbb39e8c250b20325)

The small squares overlap.

This is not measured correctly.

![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 5 units long with gaps. It starts at the left edge of the license but ends short of the right edge.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8f5c642fdcd5a7bce2528077628ddf77406c3e4a)

There are gaps between the squares.

This is not measured correctly.

![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 10 units long and starts and ends at the edges of the license.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8ec728e3d44b38f29c705c4afaee86b03fec2460)

**This license is measured correctly.**
The license is $\red{10}$ squares long.

choices.content: ![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 10 units long and starts and ends at the edges of the license.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8ec728e3d44b38f29c705c4afaee86b03fec2460)

![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 10 units long but they are spaced uneven with gaps. It starts and ends at the edges of the license.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/57d05b8730c23c620a43b7bbbb39e8c250b20325)

![The license is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 5 units long with gaps. It starts at the left edge of the license but ends short of the right edge.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8f5c642fdcd5a7bce2528077628ddf77406c3e4a)

assessment_items.question_content:
How long is the drawing?

You can measure the drawing with small squares.  

**Which picture shows how to measure the drawing?** 
[[☃ radio 1]]
**The drawing is** [[☃ input-number 1]] **squares long.**
hints:
![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 13 units long and does not start and end at the edges of the drawing.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/92454b384e9db7cf8e596daf21483070.png)

The squares do not start at the left edge of the drawing.

The squares do not stop at the right edge.

This is not measured correctly.

![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod 8 units followed by a gap and 3 more units.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9956232c6837f1b4eb991352db226ac3.png)

There is a gap between the squares.

This is not measured correctly.

![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 13 units long and starts and ends at the edges of the drawing.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0a2cb982fb0d14f6312a056660d0b408.png)

**This drawing is measured correctly.**
The drawing is $\red{13}$ squares long.

choices.content: ![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 13 units long and starts and ends at the edges of the drawing.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0a2cb982fb0d14f6312a056660d0b408.png)
![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod is 13 units long and does not start and end at the edges of the drawing.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/92454b384e9db7cf8e596daf21483070.png)
![A drawing is above a unit cube rod. The rod 8 units followed by a gap and 3 more units.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9956232c6837f1b4eb991352db226ac3.png)
